description: next/ v4 — PHASE-0 ARCHITECTURE FIX: REAL ERP CustomerOrder via the sim-v5 ERP REST API (http://192.168.178.154:38260/api/customer-orders), replacing the postgresql/erp-customer-orders.json direct-erpdb poller. IT data must flow ONLY via REST -> it-edge -> NATS; the previous sourceType:postgresql against erpdb.llm_test_v3.kundenauftraege was the forbidden direct-DB bypass. Same sourceId (edge SOURCE_IDS unchanged), same profile contract (SMProfile-CustomerOrder). KEY FIX: gesamtbetrag -> total_amount — the REST API exposes the real order-value column the direct poller never mapped (the old source only carried quantity x unit_price as a proxy); total_amount now feeds the deviation €-impact ranking directly (it-evaluator still derives quantity x unit_price as fallback where total_amount is null). status arrives already canonical/lowercase from the REST API (offen/bestaetigt/...), so NO valueMap is needed (the postgres source normalised the German title-case dialect — the REST projection emits the canonical vocab natively). geplante_stueckzahl -> quantity (ordered line qty), lieferdatum_soll -> due_date (the customer delivery commitment; lieferdatum is the same value in this projection). full_refresh change-detection (intervalMs 60000) because the REST API does NOT honour a ?since timestamp param (verified: ?since=future still returns the full set) — the it-edge dedups via the per-id HWM on order_no exactly as it does for the other full_refresh REST sources (wms-quants). NOTE: in the real ERP the CustomerOrder->ProductionOrder TRIGGERS FK lives on the order row's production_order_no; the KG TRIGGERS edge is built from that fkColumn. filter=null per the cutover decision (full active order book; the REST API already serves the order set).
